# VeriMarka

VeriMarka is a web service for image copyright registration, watermark insertion, blockchain proof issuance, and authenticity verification.

## Core pages
- Korean home: https://verimarka.com/ko
- Register content: https://verimarka.com/ko/register
- Verify content: https://verimarka.com/ko/verify
- Support and FAQ: https://verimarka.com/ko/support
- Terms: https://verimarka.com/ko/terms
- Privacy: https://verimarka.com/ko/privacy
- English home: https://verimarka.com/en
- Japanese home: https://verimarka.com/ja
- Simplified Chinese home: https://verimarka.com/zh-CN

## What the service does
- Upload image-based content for similarity analysis
- Insert a watermark into approved content
- Record issuance data on blockchain
- Verify whether an image contains watermark evidence and registration history

## Audience
- Creators
- Copyright owners
- Review and trust teams

## Contact
- Support email: emfpdlzj@gmail.com
